name: Artichoke Cheese Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 can artichoke hearts, drained, trimmed, and chopped (1 to 14 ounces)
1/2 lb. Swiss or sharp Cheddar cheese
Pepper to taste -- and/or dash Tabasco
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet, and sauté onion and garlic until soft and translucent but not brown.
2. Beat eggs in a bowl; add chopped artichoke hearts. Stir in the rest of the ingredients.
3. Pour mixture into a 7 x 11 baking dish.
4. Bake at 325 degrees F for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
5. Let cool before cutting into squares.
